svg.title: hise-cli TUI Color Reference
svg.text: Fixed across all schemes. Matches the C++ macros in the HISE codebase.
Fixed across all schemes. Appear on: prompt >, top bar [mode], sidebar heading, output ▎ border.
Matches the HISE code editor. Used for script mode input and partial highlighting in builder/DSP.
User-selectable via /theme. Each scheme defines 5 backgrounds + 3 foregrounds = 8 values.
Top bar, bottom bar, progress row, command echo background
Sidebar panel — between content and input in visual depth
Input area — visually "raised" above the output
Command palette, completion popup — floats above everything
All 8 schemes showing their 5 background tiers side by side.
